identity.canonical_title: Index Source Format Inline Paren Equation

theory.canonical_statement: ID4725 records Index Source Format Inline Paren Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\6_Outputs\publish_reassemble\reassembled_run_1.json` for registry alignment and later derivation.
